meta_title: For Founders: portfolio building to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Portfolio Building to Solve 'Can't Finish Projects'
content.seo_description: Stop the cycle of unfinished apps. Learn how to leverage portfolio building for SaaS success using Antigravity and Claude Code. A guide for AI Founders.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of commercial feedback loops. By shifting from 'building everything' to 'portfolio building'—releasing modular, high-value micro-tools—you validate market demand early. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to automate the technical heavy lifting, forcing your project to a launch-ready state.
content.intro:
The graveyard of abandoned GitHub repositories is paved with good intentions and feature creep. As a founder, you aren't fighting a lack of skill; you are fighting the siren song of 'perfect code' that never sees a customer. You start with a vision, get lost in the architecture, and eventually, the momentum dies under the weight of unfinished complexity.

It is time to pivot from 'building a startup' to 'portfolio building.' By treating your projects as modular, monetizable assets rather than monolithic dreams, you regain the ability to ship. This checklist bridges the gap between your prototype and a live, revenue-generating product using the latest in AI-assisted development.

steps.title: Define the Micro-Value Proposition
steps.description: Strip your project down to a single, high-value feature that solves a specific pain point. If it takes more than 48 hours to build, it's too big.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project idea: [IDEA]. Extract the single most valuable feature that could be sold as a standalone micro-SaaS tool. Generate a 1-page PRD focusing on MVP scope only.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project plan for [IDEA] focusing on a 48-hour MVP scope.'

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Stop setting up boilerplate. Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready foundation that includes auth, database, and payment integration immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full-stack SaaS scaffold using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include user authentication and a basic dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project using the scaffold generated by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Focus your human effort on the unique business logic while Claude Code handles the boilerplate wiring and API integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the core logic for [FEATURE] into a clean, testable service layer. Ensure it handles edge cases for error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the business logic for [FEATURE] based on the PRD. Ensure all API calls are typed.'

steps.title: Hard-Coded Deployment Path
steps.description: Deployment shouldn't be a hurdle. Configure automated CI/CD pipelines so every commit is a potential product release.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Configure CI/CD pipeline for Vercel deployment and set up environment variables.'

steps.title: Monetization Integration
steps.description: If the code doesn't have a payment gateway, it's a hobby. Wire up Stripe immediately to validate the project's viability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe integration script to handle one-time payments for the MVP feature. Include webhook handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Integrate Stripe checkout flow. Create a webhook endpoint to update user subscription status in the DB.'

pro_tips: Never build a feature that doesn't have a direct link to a Stripe API call.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your business logic BEFORE writing the actual code to force clarity.
If you find yourself stuck for more than 2 hours, delete the last 50 lines of code; you've over-engineered it.
Treat every project in your portfolio as a 'sales page' first—if you can't describe it in one sentence, don't build it.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative tests' to see how your app breaks before you launch it.
content.next_steps: Once your first micro-tool is live, spend 7 days focused entirely on distribution and gathering feedback. Use that data to iterate or pivot to the next project in your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the framework to stop the cycle of unfinished projects. The only thing missing is your execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
